prompts.name: Castle Hall
prompts.text: Place the scene in a grand medieval castle hall with stone walls, banners, long tables, torchlight, and noble atmosphere.

prompts.name: Medieval Village
prompts.text: Create a medieval village with timber-framed houses, cobblestone paths, market stalls, and grounded historical detail.

prompts.name: Blacksmith Workshop
prompts.text: Set the scene in a blacksmith workshop with glowing forge, tools, anvils, sparks, and rugged handcrafted texture.

prompts.name: Tavern
prompts.text: Place the scene in a warm medieval tavern with wooden beams, candlelight, mugs, barrels, and lively rustic atmosphere.

prompts.name: Forest Road
prompts.text: Create a medieval forest road with wagon tracks, tall trees, mossy stones, and travel-worn atmosphere.

prompts.name: Knight Armor
prompts.text: Add medieval knight armor with polished plate, leather straps, chainmail texture, and realistic weight.

prompts.name: Royal Court
prompts.text: Create a royal court setting with elegant banners, polished floors, noble clothing, and refined ceremonial presence.

prompts.name: Monastery
prompts.text: Place the scene in a quiet monastery with stone arches, candles, manuscripts, and peaceful spiritual atmosphere.

prompts.name: Market Square
prompts.text: Create a medieval market square with colorful stalls, baskets, fabrics, people, and authentic daily-life detail.

prompts.name: After Battle
prompts.text: Create a restrained medieval battlefield aftermath with broken banners, muddy ground, distant smoke, and dramatic historical mood.

prompts.name: Throne Room
prompts.text: Place the subject in a medieval throne room with carved stone, royal decorations, dramatic light, and authority.

prompts.name: Wizard Tower
prompts.text: Set the scene in an old wizard tower with books, candles, maps, telescopes, and magical scholarly clutter.

prompts.name: Countryside Farm
prompts.text: Create a medieval countryside farm with fields, wooden fences, simple cottages, animals, and warm rural detail.

prompts.name: Cathedral Interior
prompts.text: Place the scene inside a medieval cathedral with high arches, stained glass, stone columns, and solemn beauty.

prompts.name: Dungeon Corridor
prompts.text: Create a medieval dungeon corridor with rough stone, iron bars, torchlight, and cautious atmospheric tension.
